name: Game Master Module
short_description: Game Master RPG module, a sandbox tabletop sim.
detailed_description:
Game Master Module is a tool for expanding the experience of your online RPG sessions.
Thanks to the ability to set up a personalized board with miniatures, you can play a unique game alone or with friends.
Transfer all your designs and dreams to easy-to-use virtual worlds.

Play a 100-unit battle or a game of chess. You are only limited by your imagination!

Bring your favorite RPG system to the Game Master Module.

Our game is distinguished by:
-ability to load any 3D models (FBX, OBJ, STL), so you can play the game in any world
-possibility of creating any board size
-possibility of loading any graphics as the board background (JPG, PNG, BMP)
-Easy-to-use terrain construction
-dedicated notebook for each unit and for the game master
-three dedicated modes of moving units: square grid, hexagonal grid and no grid
-ability to edit colors and names of units
-dice rolling simulator

Post-release features:
-2D board mode
-Multiplayer
-Fog of war
-Creator of corridors and rooms
-Creator of objects on the board (hills, rivers, lakes, forests, etc.)

Please contact us: info@mielczarekart.com
